{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322014118BA6DB46D37F3C7270A6A"}"},"total":3084},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7485989264875225881","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很好，感情戏很真实，就我个人而言我不讨厌感情戏，我只是不喜欢莫名其妙的感情戏。少室山哪一段感情戏我觉得写的很好，一段话语无伦次很真实，现实里你真喜欢一个人是真的会嘴变笨的，说完后恨不得给自己一耳光那种。最后一句不想让你受伤害那就是真的属于水到渠成，而不是什么舔狗。
反而别的小说里一直撩妹子游刃有余的，那要么是海王，要么是单身狗的自己yy的剧情"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742971725,"group_id":"7442158625126108222","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5xB/boQRnFhMpHo2feAoE+rOC8jcQygv2VZQNckLiDF","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1744291644572908","user_name":"沛公军霸上"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1744291644572908","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7442158625126108222","book_info":{"abstract":"（单女主，神雕已经完结，倚天也结束了，现在是洪武时期。）
好消息，重生了，还带着一个熟练度模板，任何功法只要刷熟练度，就能无瓶颈修炼下去，突破极限还能衍生新的功法。
万剑归宗攻伐无敌
大椿神功长生不死
御剑飞行日行万里
战神图录、小李飞刀、寒冰神掌、天龙八音、惊龙变、龙神功......
坏消息，我叫尹志平，师父叫丘处机，还有个师弟叫甄志丙。
问世间情为何物，直教生死相许。
天南地北双飞客，老翅几回寒暑。
尹志平表示，自己不想恋上小龙女。
却没料到，恋上了她师姐，李莫愁。
南宋之后又元朝，元朝之后即大明。
大明千秋万代，永世不朽。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6878d5940a09056935afe236467e8870","author":"泡泡追泡泡","author_id":"","book_id":"7442158625126108222","book_name":"穿越尹志平，唯爱李莫愁","book_short_name":"苟道长","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7442158627814654526","read_count":"68391","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2020201"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"984","tags":"男频衍生,武侠,穿越,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/83e2ec909a74dc0682889eee6eacc3a2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779298878&x-signature=wSvZDzBTYosqulK1GVZb1w84fSM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1236264956728525","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"83"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322014118BA6DB46D37F3C7270A6A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":79,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10095,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":103086},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7500952551956185881","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的部分设定很新颖，例如这是个武侠世界而主角拥有仙人手段，而又不是强的特别夸张、仙人技能层出不穷那种，个人很喜欢，包括和李莫愁相遇的部分，很引人入胜，只是一下子两个人就结婚了、小孩一下子十岁了就没有那种浪漫的感觉了，加上主角小孩大一点之后，对女儿尹天雪和郭芙的心理等描写太多了，当然啦这样其实不失温情个人也挺喜欢的，就是“太”多了让人感觉在水字数了，例如在天山派的时候，一边干仗一边描写两个小女孩的内容，真的很像在水字数…总体来说这是本人读过这两年最特别的一本小说，本以为是系统爽文，但描写的很新颖、特别、引人入胜，希望不要那么快完结"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746457239,"group_id":"7442158625126108222","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0pH7bjo+gaKHS0d5g2gI/CwsJdJTudJpUojzAbEqRKy","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4077458604435396","user_name":"松陵的杨家主"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4077458604435396","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7442158625126108222","book_info":{"abstract":"（单女主，神雕已经完结，倚天也结束了，现在是洪武时期。）
